zh.lifeSummary: 當James Covey於1772年10月12日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼度斯時，他的父親James Hope Covey Jr.57歲，母親Mary Lamphere50歲。他於1794年與Phebe Smith在美國紐約州格林結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1831年9月5日在美國紐約州格林劍橋大學默里 巴爾的摩劍橋大學默里 巴爾的摩享年58歲，埋葬在美國紐約州格林劍橋大學默里 巴爾的摩格拉維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Covey于1772年10月12日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼度斯时，他的父亲James Hope Covey Jr.57岁，母亲Mary Lamphere50岁。他于1794年与Phebe Smith在美国纽约州格林结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1831年9月5日在美国纽约州格林劍橋大學默里 巴爾的摩劍橋大學默里 巴爾的摩享年58岁，埋葬在美国纽约州格林劍橋大學默里 巴爾的摩格拉維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Covey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened form of MacCovey, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cobhthaigh (see Coffey ).

English: unexplained. Covey is used of ‘pantry’ in the early modern period and covey ‘little chap’ (a diminutive of cove, Middle English cof ‘bold, eager, courageous’; see Cove ) in the early nineteenth century, but there is no evidence to confirm either as the source for the surname.

variants.name: Coffey
meanings: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cathbhadha ‘descendant of Cathbhadh’, a byname meaning ‘battle tent’, Ó Cathbhuadhaigh ‘descendant of Cathbhuadhach’ (‘battle victorious’), or Ó Cathmhogha ‘descendant of Cathmhugh’ (‘battle slave’).
shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cobhthaigh ‘descendant of Cobhthach’, a byname meaning ‘victorious’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: The First Presidential Election
historicEvents.description: The First Presidential election was held in the newly created United States of America. Under the Articles of Confederation, the executive branch of the country was not set up for an individual to help lead the nation. So, under the United States Constitution they position was put in. Because of his prominent roles during the Revolutionary War, George Washington was voted in unanimously as the First President of the United States.
Historical Boundaries: 1800: Greene, New York, United States
France sells Louisiana territories to U.S.A.

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

historicEvents.title: Slavery Becomes Illegal in New York State
historicEvents.description: During the years 1799 to 1827, New York went through a period of gradual emancipation. A Gradual Emancipation Law was passed in 1799 which freed slave children born after July 4, 1799. However, they were indentured until 25 years old for women and 28 years old for men. A law passed 1817 which freed slaves born before 1799, yet delayed their emancipation for ten years. All remaining slaves were freed in New York State on July 4, 1827.

en.lifeSummary: When James Covey was born on 12 October 1772, in Dutchess, New York Colony, British Colonial America, his father, James Hope Covey Jr., was 57 and his mother, Mary Lamphere, was 50. He married Phebe Smith in 1794, in Greene, New York, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 5 September 1831, in New Baltimore, New Baltimore, Greene, New York, United States, at the age of 58, and was buried in Grapeville, New Baltimore, Greene, New York, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Covey est né le 12 octobre 1772, à Dutchess, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, James Hope Covey Jr., avait 57 ans et sa mère, Mary Lamphere, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Phebe Smith en 1794, à Greene, New York, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 septembre 1831, à New Baltimore, New Baltimore, Greene, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Grapeville, New Baltimore, Greene, New York, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Covey am 12. Oktober 1772 in Dutchess, New York Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Hope Covey Jr. 57 und seine Mutter Mary Lamphere 50. Er hat 1794 in Greene, New York, Vereinigte Staaten Phebe Smith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. September 1831 im Alter von 58 Jahren in New Baltimore, New Baltimore, Greene, New York, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Grapeville, New Baltimore, Greene, New York, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Covey è nato il il 12 ottobre 1772 nel Dutchess, New York Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, James Hope Covey Jr., aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Mary Lamphere, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Phebe Smith nel 1794, nel Greene, New York, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 settembre 1831, nel New Baltimore, New Baltimore, Greene, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Grapeville, New Baltimore, Greene, New York, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: James Coveyが1772年10月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーダトチェスで生まれた時，父James Hope Covey Jr.は57歳，母Mary Lamphereは50歳であった。1794年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州グレエンでPhebe Smithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1831年9月5日にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州グレエンニュー ボーティモーニュー ボーティモーで58歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州グレエンニュー ボーティモーグラペヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Covey(이)가 1772년 10월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 드트체스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Hope Covey Jr.(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Lamphere(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1794년 미국 뉴욕 주 그린에서 Phebe Smith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1831년 9월 5일 미국 뉴욕 주 그린 뉴 바팀어 뉴 바팀어에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴욕 주 그린 뉴 바팀어 그라p에빌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Covey nasceu em 12 de outubro de 1772, em Dutchess, New York Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, James Hope Covey Jr., tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Mary Lamphere, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Phebe Smith em 1794, em Greene, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de setembro de 1831, em New Baltimore, New Baltimore, Greene, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Grapeville, New Baltimore, Greene, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Covey родился 12 октября 1772 г. в местности дучесс, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени James Hope Covey Jr. было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Lamphere, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Phebe Smith в 1794 г. в местности грин, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 сентября 1831 г. в местности ню балтимор, ню балтимор, грин, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности грапевилл, ню балтимор, грин, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты.
